scripts.android:build: bash -lc 'source scripts/android-env.sh && printf "sdk.dir=%s\n" "$ANDROID_HOME" > android/local.properties && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease && mkdir -p ../dist && cp app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk ../dist/Pulse-release.apk && echo "APK -> dist/Pulse-release.apk (embedded JS, no Metro)"'
scripts.android:build:debug: bash -lc 'source scripts/android-env.sh && printf "sdk.dir=%s\n" "$ANDROID_HOME" > android/local.properties && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && mkdir -p ../dist && cp app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk ../dist/Pulse-debug.apk && echo "APK -> dist/Pulse-debug.apk (needs Metro: npx expo start)"'
